markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's proposed content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** GrowthX's 6-cluster content strategy was approved. It targets founders with sales-led billing complexity, a niche missed by enterprise-focused competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [**Critical Feedback:** The strategy will be updated with new product page copy and a revised competitor list. This ensures alignment with Turnstile's messaging and accurate market context.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [**Production Timeline:** The 8-week sprint starts with a calibration article next week. The goal is to have a small backlog of articles ready for the blog's launch.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [**Turnstile Actions:** Provide Webflow CMS access, the visual design guide, and feedback on the updated artifacts by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team & Process

  - [**Roles:** William Leborgne (Primary Engagement Manager), Aida Knezevic (Execution & Content Calendar), Kathy (Shadowing).](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The 8-week sprint follows this sequence:](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Dev:** Kickoff, discovery, artifact creation.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
    2.  [**Calibration:** Review a sample article to lock in voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
    3.  [**Production Ramp-up:** Scale content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
    4.  [**Full Production:** Ongoing content and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
    5.  [**Contract Transition:** Option for a full-year contract.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

### Content Strategy: 6 Topic Clusters

  - [**Goal:** Reach 500+ customers by EOY 2026 by becoming a core part of the startup toolkit.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**Competitive Moat:** Competitors (Chargebee, Maxio) target established companies ($10M+ ARR) with sales teams. Turnstile's strategy focuses on founders and early ops teams.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**1. QuotaCache Fundamentals (High Priority)**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - **Goal:** Rank \#1 for foundational founder questions (e.g., "tools for my first contract").
      - [**Rationale:** Low competition, high winnability. Jordan noted the audience is new to these concepts, so content must be educational.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [**2. Revenue Operations (High Priority)**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture founders hitting a billing crisis (e.g., 10-15 hrs/week on billing, data mismatches).](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Seema flagged "RevOps" is ambiguous. The focus is on billing/provisioning, not the broader sales/marketing ops function. Jordan suggested "Sales Ops" as a more precise term.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**3. Solutions Comparisons (High Priority)**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture high-intent users comparing tools.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aida noted these articles drive fast results (e.g., a similar article for another client was cited by ChatGPT in 2-3 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Jordan questioned comparing Stripe vs. Chargebee. William clarified the goal is to join the conversation and build authority, not just promote Turnstile.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**4. Sales-Led Billing Complexity (High Priority)**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [**Goal:** Target companies adding enterprise sales, who realize manual Stripe work is unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Highly topical and directly addresses the moment Stripe users become Turnstile prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**5. Subscription Management**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [**Goal:** Target founders managing subscriptions with spreadsheets.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Jordan clarified "Dunning" is for unpaid bills, not just failed payments.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [**6. Financial Foundations for SaaS**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
      - [**Goal:** Educate technical founders on SaaS metrics (MRR, AR) for investor conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Builds trust and provides internal linking opportunities to strengthen SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)

### Artifacts & Competitor List Feedback

  - [**Artifacts:** William shared discovery artifacts (product, customer, competitor analysis) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Action:** Seema will ask Lillian (co-founder, product/design/eng) to review.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
      - [**Update:** GrowthX will incorporate new product page copy before the review to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [**Competitor List:** Jordan noted the list felt imprecise, with inconsistent vertical labels.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The list is based on organic search overlap, not product categories. It's a living document for ongoing keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
      - [**Action:** Jordan will review for missing companies (e.g., Metronome) and flag any incorrect inclusions.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)

      - [Ask Lillian to review artifacts after GrowthX incorporates new product page copy.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
      - [Send the project timeline asset to Seema.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Notify Seema via Slack when artifacts are updated and ready for Lillian's review.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
      - [Incorporate new product page copy into the artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
      - [Prepare a calibration article for review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
      - [Prepare AI-generated feature image examples for review.](https://fathom.video/share/6yvy_H33z4XQsT41Tpg8UveVunNmmTxb?tab=summary&timestamp=2745.0)
